question_text:
The number of given statement/s which is/are correct is __________.
(A) The stronger the temperature dependence of the rate constant, the higher is the activation energy.
(B) If a reaction has zero activation energy, its rate is independent of temperature.
(C) The stronger the temperature dependence of the rate constant, the smaller is the activation energy.
(D) If there is no correlation between the temperature and the rate constant then it means that the reaction has negative activation energy.

question_text: A current of $$2 \mathrm{~A}$$ flows through a wire of cross-sectional area $$25.0 \mathrm{~mm}^{2}$$. The number of free electrons in a cubic meter are $$2.0 \times 10^{28}$$. The drift velocity of the electrons is __________ $$\times 10^{-6} \mathrm{~ms}^{-1}$$ (given, charge on electron $$=1.6 \times 10^{-19} \mathrm{C}$$ ).

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Nuclear Fission And Fusion And Binding Energy
question_text: A nucleus with mass number 242 and binding energy per nucleon as $$7.6~ \mathrm{MeV}$$ breaks into two fragment each with mass number 121. If each fragment nucleus has binding energy per nucleon as $$8.1 ~\mathrm{MeV}$$, the total gain in binding energy is _________ $$\mathrm{MeV}$$.

subject: Physics
question_text: The momentum of a body is increased by $$50 \%$$. The percentage increase in the kinetic energy of the body is ___________ $$\%$$.

The work done in rotating dipole by $$180^{\circ}$$ in this field will be ___________ $$\mathrm{m J}$$.

subject: Physics
question_text: Two vertical parallel mirrors A and B are separated by $$10 \mathrm{~cm}$$. A point object $$\mathrm{O}$$ is placed at a distance of $$2 \mathrm{~cm}$$ from mirror $$\mathrm{A}$$. The distance of the second nearest image behind mirror A from the mirror $$\mathrm{A}$$ is _________ $$\mathrm{cm}$$.

subject: Physics
micro_topic: Surface Tension Excess Pressure And Capillarity

The co-efficient of viscosity of the solution (neglect density of air) is ___________ Pas (given, $$\mathrm{g}=10 \mathrm{~ms}^{-2}$$ ).

subject: Physics
question_text: An oscillating LC circuit consists of a $$75 ~\mathrm{mH}$$ inductor and a $$1.2 ~\mu \mathrm{F}$$ capacitor. If the maximum charge to the capacitor is $$2.7 ~\mu \mathrm{C}$$. The maximum current in the circuit will be ___________ $$\mathrm{mA}$$

subject: Physics
question_text: The moment of inertia of a semicircular ring about an axis, passing through the center and perpendicular to the plane of ring, is $$\frac{1}{x} \mathrm{MR}^{2}$$, where $$\mathrm{R}$$ is the radius and $$M$$ is the mass of the semicircular ring. The value of $$x$$ will be __________.
